Title: Prohibits mobile sports wagering operators from conditioning the withdrawal of funds on a requirement that a sports bettor first wager deposited funds
Summary: Prohibits mobile sports wagering operators from imposing any condition requiring an authorized sports bettor to wager deposited funds as a prerequisite to withdrawing such funds.
LawSection: Racing, Pari-Mutuel Wagering and Breeding Law
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the racing, pari-mutuel wagering and breeding law, in relation to prohibiting mobile sports wagering operators from conditioning the withdrawal of funds on a requirement that a sports bettor first wager deposited funds
